goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'friday'.
The train should depart from 'london kings cross' and should 'leave after 14:15'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should serve 'european' food.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on friday
The train should depart from london kings cross and should leave after 14:15
Make sure you get price and train ID
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve european food
